nasb.text: Then those who are in Judea must flee to the mountains, and those who are in the midst of the city must leave, and those who are in the country must not enter the city;

esv.text: Then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains, and let those who are inside the city depart, and let not those who are out in the country enter it,

cnv.text: 那時，住在猶太的，應該逃到山上；住在城裡的，要離開；住在鄉下的，不要進城。

ccb.text: 那时，住在犹太地区的人要赶快逃到山上去，住在城里的人要跑到城外，住在乡村的人不要进城，

csbs.text: 那时，在犹太的人应当逃到山里；在城里的人应当出来；在乡下的人不要进城；
